text:
Sun-bin (ソンビン, Sonbin) is a member of the Cha-R Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 377 

Appearance

Sun-bin is a man with thin, fair hair and slanted eyes. During his first appearance, he wears a zipper jacket and dark pants. His most distinguishing feature is the rose tattoo on the left side of his neck. 

Personality

Sun-bin speaks in an informal fashion. Even while expressing concern, he wears a deadpan, even bored expression. He claims to abhor bloodshed, although according to his leader, that is a lie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Sun-bin is among the members of the Cha-R Family who boarded the Black Whale. His group surrounds the Phantom Troupe as they sit at their table, asking them to move. When they leave peacefully, the leader of the group asks Sun-bin for his impressions of the Spiders. Sun-bin replies they are bad news and indomitable, adding that they will do so without worrying about keeping Nen secret if they want to get to the first tier. The leader tells him to contact the Underboss and warn him a fight might break out. Sun-bin then claims he despises bloodshed, but the leader calls him a liar. 

After telling himself that Hisoka should be their first priority, Ken'i addresses several Cha-R members (including Sun-bin) and says that the Xi-Yu will have an advantage if the civilian they encountered was Hisoka. He stresses that finding Hisoka is their top priority and that they will use him to crush both the Heil-Ly and the Troupe in order to maintain balance. He reminds them that they know nothing of the Heil-Ly besides their boss and orders them not to approach Hisoka until he arrives, adding that he was a Floor Master at Heavens Arena. He says that if he or Hinrigh successfully negotiates with him, they can simply sit back while the Troupe and Heil-Ly fight each other. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 392 

Equipment

Handgun: Sun-bin owns a handgun of unknown model and caliber. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Sun-bin is a Nen user. He has enough skill to recognize the power of the Phantom Troupe members by looking at their aura flow, although they were making no effort to conceal it. 

Manga Appearances

Quotes

(When asked if the Spiders are trouble) "Hellz yeah. They can't be tamed. Wild firedrakes. If they want to get to Tier 1, they'll get there. No doubt about it. The worst part is they have no interest in hiding Nen. Nen is too much of a threat. Those who have it observe the unspoken rules to preserve the balance...! Like Jenga. If they go upstairs, it'll all come crashing down."
